---
title: "Research"
toc: false
listing:
  id: papers
  contents:
    - research/edtech-kenyan-girls.qmd
    - research/living-room-screens.qmd
    - research/global-automation-atlas.qmd
    - research/from-pilots-to-prompts.qmd
    - research/mechanisms-reading-comprehension.qmd
    - research/impact-prediction-bhm-nlp.qmd
    - research/query2effect-causal-effects.qmd
    - research/complementarities-ai-human-guidance.qmd
    - research/skills-job-matching-south-africa.qmd
    - research/income-satiation.qmd
    - research/neuroscience-of-agency.qmd
  type: default
  sort: false
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, author, description, categories]
---
